title: Buttery Silky Nostalgic Chicken Stir-fry
description: A grand marnier infused Moroccan dish featuring sous-vide cooked chicken with a silky and buttery texture that is high-protein-friendly.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons butter
ingredients.notes: for sautéing and finishing the dish

ingredients.name: Grand Marnier (optional)
ingredients.notes: for added flavor and sweetness, can be omitted for dietary purposes

instructions: Prepare the sous-vide cooked chicken thigh according to your preferred method.
In a saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add lemon juice and heavy cream, whisking until smooth and thickened.
Season with salt and pepper, then add Grand Marnier if using (reserve for garnish). Simmer gently for an additional minute to meld the flavors.
Remove from heat and pour over the cooked chicken. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
